title: Aduncan
compiled_truth: Aduncan is an external contact at [Kilstock](companies/kilstock). Over the corpus period (2000-06-28 to 2001-01-08), Aduncan sent 11 and received 62 emails, totalling 73 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (11), [Tom Chapman](people/tom-chapman) (8), [Jfine](people/jfine-kilstock) (8), [Heather Kroll](people/heather-kroll) (7), [Jeffrey M Keenan](people/jeffrey-m-keenan) (7).
